title: The Minehattan Project
description: Plutonium, pulverisers, and pointed sticks: war never changes.
body:
# Welcome to The Minehattan Project

High-tech warfare on a global scale.

## What's it all about?

This pack contains a curated selection of technology mods, designed around the concept of a multiplayer 'cold war' scenario. Build a defensive bunker, automate your ores, construct shielding and storage solutions, and - perhaps most importantly - have an arms race with lasers, rocket launchers, and powerful explosives.

## Help, I've run into a problem!

Please use the [GitHub issue tracker](https://github.com/LunarLoony/The-Minehattan-Project/issues) to submit your issue. Don't forget to search first, and find out if it's been rectified already. Thanks!

## Which mods are included?

There are over 100 mods within this pack! The main gameplay-affecting mods are as follows:

* [ICBM](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/icbm-classic)
* [Mekanism](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mekanism)
* [Thermal Expansion](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thermal-expansion)
* [IndustrialCraft 2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/industrial-craft)
* [Industrial Foregoing](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/industrial-foregoing)
* [Extreme Reactors](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/extreme-reactors)
* [Immersive Engineering](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-engineering)
* [Modular Powersuits](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/modular-powersuits)
* [Project Red](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/project-red-core)
* [Tinker's Construct](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tinkers-construct)
* [Forestry](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/forestry)
* [Biomes O' Plenty](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biomes-o-plenty)
* [BiblioCraft](https://www.bibliocraftmod.com/)

To see a full list, with links to each mod, see [The Spreadsheet™](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/18Wl-xhsqS3rdzAS38ZpcAr1O1hzAgOW1L3ev8F_L8ZU/edit?usp=sharing).

## Which version should I play?

The Minehattan Project was made for a YouTube series in 2013, with a later update in 2014. The older versions still work as intended, but please note they will not be updated in any major way - only if they desperately need fixing!

If you want an old-school arms race with an assortment of classic mods, go for [version 1](https://modrinth.com/modpack/minehattan-project/version/1.4.2) for Minecraft 1.5.2.

To get the most authentic experience, I recommend [version 2](https://modrinth.com/modpack/minehattan-project/version/2.4.1) for Minecraft 1.6.4.

[Version 5](https://modrinth.com/modpack/minehattan-project/version/5.0.6) is the current version for Minecraft 1.19.2, which will give you a traditional Minehattan Project experience with a few new twists! No turtling allowed.

In case you're wondering: versions 3 and 4, for MC 1.12.1 and 1.12.2 respectively, do exist - but they lack many of the key mods which make the pack what it is, so I didn't think it was worth putting in the time to release them.
